title: rosa dumalis var. kosinsciana
intro: Rosa dumalis var. kosinsciana, also known as the Korean wild rose, is a type of flowering shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis var. kosinsciana include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Rosa dumalis var. kosinsciana is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in herbal teas, infusions, and salves.
